name: Mcdonald's Broccoli Cheese Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 slice Kraft Singles Cheddar Cheese, Cut into Bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Into blender, add first 6 ingredients. Blend on high until smooth.
2. Pick out larger pieces of broccoli and put in blender. Blend those until tiny bits.
3. Set aside 3/4 cup cooking water from broccoli and discard the rest of the water.
4. Pour blender mixture into top of double broiler over simmering water, stirring until smooth and thickened. Add back the reserved cooking water and finely diced broccoli.
5. Stir in remaining ingredients.
